Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2026

Overview

This Privacy Policy explains how CogniElevate collects, uses, and protects information when you visit our website or interact with our products.

Information We Collect

We may collect:

  • Basic contact information such as email
  • Device and browser information
  • Usage and interaction data

How We Use Information

  • Improve product performance
  • Respond to support requests
  • Analyze usage trends

Data Sharing

We do not sell personal information. Data may be shared with trusted services that help operate the platform.

Data Security

We apply reasonable safeguards, but no system is 100% secure.

Your Rights

You may request access, updates, or deletion depending on your jurisdiction.

Contact

Email: cognielevate@gmail.com

Intelligent systems that give people their time back.
